contract.title: The Ninth Mourner's Receipt
contract.premise: An undertaker's receipt bills an estate for a ninth mourner no one remembers hiring.

evidence_assets.title: Undertaker receipt
evidence_assets.public_summary: A paid receipt lists one mourner more than the household account admits.

evidence_assets.title: Estate sale notice
evidence_assets.public_summary: A mourning ring lot was added after the printed catalogue closed.

hidden_truth.summary: The ninth mourner is a debt proxy used to move a living heir's obligation into the corpse ledger.

artifacts.title: Undertaker Receipt
artifacts.public_summary: The undertaker charged for nine veiled attendants at a wake recorded with only eight witnesses.
artifacts.full_text: Receipt: nine veiled attendants paid from the estate purse. Clerk's margin: one name was settled off-ledger.

artifacts.title: Mourning Ring Notice
artifacts.public_summary: A mourning ring lot was inserted after catalogue closure.
artifacts.full_text: Catalogue notice: black enamel ring added by private instruction after print. Viewing restricted to bonded crews.

artifacts.title: Parish Burial Index
artifacts.public_summary: The parish index records an altered witness count and a scratched family initial.
artifacts.full_text: Burial index: witness count overwritten from eight to nine. The scratched initial matches the estate's disputed heir.

artifacts.title: Black Glove Thread
artifacts.public_summary: A glove thread carries chapel wax and funeral soot.
artifacts.full_text: Material note: black glove thread recovered from ring case hinge. Wax trace matches a chapel taper, not a funeral candle.

edges.public_summary: The receipt's ninth attendant points toward the parish witness count.
The restricted ring viewing points toward material left in the case.
The altered witness record and glove trace support a chapel-linked substitution.

unlock_rules.award_reason: Checked the parish burial index behind the undertaker's receipt.
Inspected the ring case for glove and wax traces.

allowed_reveal_strings: The witness count no longer holds.
The ring case carries a chapel trace.
